backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Deeds ICP backend, defining all data types and state maps (posts, profiles, messages, live sessions, marketplace, etc.) and exposing access control, user profile, and social feature endpoints. Includes migration support and blob storage mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old Post type (without parentPostId) to the new Post type (with parentPostId defaulting to null) when upgrading canister state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Ripple Effect Stories, Love Notes, Deed of the Day, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes of every component, hook, and utility in the frontend/src directory.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Deeds React app, setting the favicon, viewport meta, description, theme color, and mounting the React app at #root.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Deeds, defining app name, display mode, theme/background colors, and icon paths for installable app support.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (v4) implementing a caching strategy: always-fresh for JS/CSS bundles, network-first for navigation, cache-first for assets, and network-first for everything else, with old cache cleanup on activation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router with all routes (feed, profile, messages, live, blog, marketplace, love-notes, deed-of-the-day, kindness-matches, etc.), wraps the app in QueryClient and auth providers, and handles service worker update banners and startup recovery.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin dashboard component that verifies admin status via the actor and renders tabbed management tools including service status, storage cleanup, network, database, and system panels.
frontend/src/components/BlogCard.tsx: Displays a single blog post card with author avatar, timestamp, content truncation, media type badges, and a link to the author's profile modal.
frontend/src/components/BlogPage.tsx: Renders the blog listing page with a sorted list of BlogCard components, loading skeletons, an empty state, and a button to open the CreateBlogModal.
frontend/src/components/ChallengeCountdo: Displays a live countdown timer to midnight, updating every second, with hours, minutes, and seconds shown as styled time units.
Renders a comments section for a post with a textarea form for new comments and a sorted list of existing CommentItem components; comment creation is stubbed as coming soon.
frontend/src/components/CreateBlogButton: A button component that opens the CreateBlogModal when clicked.
Modal dialog for creating a new blog post with fields for title, content, categories, tags, live toggle, and multi-file media upload with preview and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/CreateMarketplac: A modal dialog component for creating marketplace posts with fields for title, description, location, contact method, category, post type (offer/need), and optional media upload up to 10MB.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostButton: A button component that triggers the CreatePostModal for sharing a good deed, styled with a gradient and plus icon.
A modal dialog for creating social posts with caption, category, optional photo/video upload, warmth/brightness sliders, and optional music selection, supporting parent post replies and daily challenge completions.
frontend/src/components/DeedOfTheDay.tsx: Displays the daily community challenge with participant completions, a countdown timer, and a button to complete the challenge via a post modal; requires user authentication.
frontend/src/components/DeedsBar.tsx: An empty file with no content.
frontend/src/components/DiscoverFeed.tsx: A discovery feed component that displays all posts with filter tabs for For You, Trending, Videos, and Photos, sorting by likes for trending or by timestamp otherwise.
frontend/src/components/Feed.tsx: The main feed component showing all posts with filter tabs (All, Videos, Photos, Text) sorted by timestamp, including a create post button for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/FollowersModal.t: A modal dialog that lists all followers of a given user principal, displaying each follower's avatar and profile info fetched individually.
frontend/src/components/FollowingModal.t: A modal dialog that lists all users a given principal is following, displaying each followed user's avatar and profile info fetched individually.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a sticky footer with copyright year, a pulsing heart icon, and a referral link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/FriendsStatusFee: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Gate.tsx: Landing/home page component that displays a hero section, feature cards (Video Reels, Blog, Challenges), and trending blog posts for unauthenticated or authenticated users, with navigation to feed or discover.
frontend/src/components/GradeDeedsRating: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with a logo, a hamburger dropdown menu linking to all app routes, and a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/HeaderMoreMenu.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/IconBadge.tsx: Reusable display component that renders a Lucide icon with optional label, supporting configurable size (sm/md/lg) and variant (default/outline/ghost) styles.
frontend/src/components/KindnessMatchCar: Card component displaying a single kindness match with the matched user's avatar, compatibility score progress bar, shared deed categories, match reason, and a 'Say Hello' button navigating to messages.
Page component that fetches and displays the current user's top kindness matches as a grid of KindnessMatchCard components, with loading, empty, and unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/LiveChatPanel.ts: Live chat panel for a streaming session that displays scrollable comments fetched by session ID, auto-scrolls on new messages, and provides a message input form to post new comments.
frontend/src/components/LiveFeed.tsx: Displays active live streaming sessions in a grid, with buttons to start a new stream or join an existing one via modals. Fetches live sessions and broadcaster profiles using custom query hooks.
Modal dialog for viewing a live stream session, showing a placeholder video area with viewer count and a side chat panel. Uses a simulated WebRTC placeholder instead of a real stream connection.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Landing/login page that prompts unauthenticated users to sign in via Internet Identity, showcasing app features like sharing deeds, joining challenges, and connecting with others.
frontend/src/components/LoveNoteCard.tsx: Renders a single love note as a toggleable sealed/opened envelope card, showing the message and timestamp when clicked open.
frontend/src/components/LoveNotes.tsx: Page for sending anonymous love notes to strangers and viewing received notes, with a character-limited textarea form and a list of received note cards.
frontend/src/components/Marketplace.tsx: Marketplace page displaying community posts filtered by type (all/needs/offers) and sortable by newest or popularity, with a button to create new posts via a modal.
Renders a card for a single marketplace post, displaying author info, category badge, post type (need/offer), location, and action buttons for messaging and saving. Fetches author profile and handles user interactions with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/MemoryJarPostCar: Displays a single saved memory jar entry in a polaroid-style card, showing the post's photo/video/caption and author info, with a remove button to delete it from the jar.
frontend/src/components/MemoryJarView.ts: Renders the full Memory Jar view by fetching and displaying all saved entries in a responsive grid of MemoryJarPostCards, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/Messages.tsx: Provides a messaging UI with a friends list (from following) on the left and a conversation area on the right, allowing the current user to send messages to selected friends.
frontend/src/components/ModerationWarnin: A simple alert banner component that displays a moderation warning with an icon and message to encourage positive content on the platform.
frontend/src/components/NotificationsPan: A dialog panel that fetches and lists user notifications sorted by timestamp, with the ability to mark individual notifications as read.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a social feed post card with author info, media, category badge, like/comment/share/memory-jar actions, and support for inspire (ripple) chains and comments section.
frontend/src/components/Profile.tsx: Displays the current user's profile page with avatar, posts, albums, followers/following counts, notifications, and memory jar, supporting profile picture uploads and status updates.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time profile setup, allowing users to enter their name, bio, and optional profile picture before saving to the backend.
Renders a recursive tree of posts (ripple chain) showing inspiration lineage, with expandable child nodes and an option to add an inspired post via a modal.
frontend/src/components/SafeImageIcon.ts: Image component that falls back to an icon and optional text when the image fails to load, using lazy loading.
frontend/src/components/ServiceStatusChe: Admin-only card component that checks and displays the backend health and photo system status via the actor's healthcheckWithPhotos method.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonBlog.tsx: Skeleton loading placeholder card mimicking a blog post layout with avatar, title, text lines, and image grid.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonMarketpl: Skeleton loading placeholder card mimicking a marketplace listing layout with avatar, title, description, image, and action buttons.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonPost.tsx: Skeleton loading placeholder card mimicking a social post layout with avatar, text lines, and a large image area.
frontend/src/components/Space.tsx: Static informational page describing the Space feature's cosmic atmosphere and customization options using two info cards.
frontend/src/components/StarEffectLogo.t: Renders a logo image with an animated canvas overlay that displays orbiting, twinkling 4-pointed star particles around it using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/components/StarlightBackgro: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/StartLiveModal.t: A modal dialog that lets a user start/end a live streaming session, managing camera/microphone access, video/audio toggles, and displaying a live chat panel alongside the video preview.
frontend/src/components/StartupRecoveryS: Displays a recovery UI screen when the app fails to load, offering a button to clear the service worker cache and reload the app.
frontend/src/components/StorageCleanup.t: Admin UI component for performing health checks and deep cleanup of IC blob storage, showing progress and results of removing unreferenced or duplicate media assets.
frontend/src/components/TalkToMeBar.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/TopLevelErrorBou: A React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors and displays a fallback UI with an error message and a reload button.
Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/UpdateAvailableB: A fixed banner notification that prompts users to apply an available app update, with fallback to a full cache-clear recovery flow if the update or reload fails.
frontend/src/components/UpdateStatusModa: A modal dialog component that allows users to update their status text, upload a status image, and attach music, with validation and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileModal: A modal dialog that displays a user's profile including avatar, bio, follower/following counts, and their posts, with a follow button for other users.
frontend/src/components/WeatherBackgroun: A canvas-based animated background component that renders rain or snow particle effects and gradient backgrounds based on current weather conditions and time of day.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context providing multi-language support for 10 languages, exposing a translation function and language switcher with translations stored as key-value records.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeedsUsage.ts: A custom hook that tracks session duration and daily app usage time using localStorage and sessionStorage, updating every second and persisting totals every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, albums, status updates, music attachments, and other app-specific entities via an actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: Tracks service worker update availability and staleness, and provides an `activateUpdate` function to skip waiting, with reload loop protection via a reload guard utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useWeather.ts: Fetches real-time weather data from the OpenMeteo API using the user's geolocation, mapping weather codes to conditions and providing a time-based fallback when geolocation or the API is unavailable.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, and adds a fade-in animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/utils/swRecovery.ts: Provides utilities for service worker recovery including clearing caches, unregistering workers, activating waiting workers, and performing a full recovery with cooldown and reload-loop prevention.
frontend/src/utils/swReloadGuard.ts: Tracks the number of service-worker-triggered page reloads per session using sessionStorage, enforcing a maximum of one reload to prevent infinite reload loops.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist, retrieve, and clear those parameters via sessionStorage and history.replaceState.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, Inter font family, CSS-variable-driven border radii, and accordion keyframe animations with the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a kindness/community platform (Deeds) with five major features in progress (Ripple Effect Stories, Love Notes, Deed of the Day, Kindness Matches, Memory Jars), including required image assets and feature metadata.
